This document describes the **manual-play narration** convergence seam and the **static audit** that keeps it from regressing quietly. Runtime contracts live in `game/planner_convergence.py`; enforcement in `game/api.py`; prompt shipping in `game/prompt_context.py` and `game/narration_plan_bundle.py`.

- Before merging anything that touches **`game/api.py`**, **`game/prompt_context.py`**, **`game/narration_plan_bundle.py`**, **`game/narrative_plan_upstream.py`**, **`game/narrative_planning.py`**, opening-scene helpers (`game/opening*.py`), or **`tools/planner_convergence_audit.py`**.

| Prompt context assembly | `game/prompt_context.py:build_narration_context` | CTIR semantics, narration plan bundle, public scene, visibility, response policy, contracts, memory, visible world slices | prompt_context | BOUNDED | No | No | Yes | Continue shrinking raw `world/session/scene` slices; document every allowed raw read. |

| Narration seam audit | `game/prompt_context.py:build_narration_context` (`narration_seam_audit`) | Missing/stamp-mismatched bundle, transition consumer, action-outcome block, dialogue plan failures | prompt_context | SAFE | No | No | No | Keep as observability only; never prompt it as substitute semantics. |

| Answer exposition prompt mirror | `game/prompt_context.py:_validate_projected_answer_exposition_plan` and response-policy mirror | Projected answer facts from public narrative plan | prompt_context | SAFE | No | No | No | Keep validation-only; fail visibly when answer required but plan projection invalid. |

| Turn packet / referent tracking renderer inputs | `game/prompt_context.py:build_turn_packet`, `build_referent_tracking_artifact` calls | Speaker, visibility, interaction continuity, narrative plan, turn packet | prompt_context | BOUNDED | No | No | UNKNOWN | Prefer bundle `renderer_inputs`; mark local construction as transitional fallback. |

| Clause referent prompt hints | `game/prompt_context.py:_project_clause_referent_prompt_hints` | Clause-level referent artifact projection | prompt_context | SAFE | No | No | No | Keep trimmed, read-side hints only. |
- **Consumer**: `game/prompt_context.py` (prompt packaging consumes the bundled plan; no second planner).

**Transport:** Bounded `world.progression` for CTIR is composed by `compose_ctir_world_progression_slice(...)` from the backbone read model plus merged `changed_node_ids` (resolution/update signals and optional session fingerprint diff). `game/prompt_context.py` **prefers** CTIR’s slice when attached and otherwise **falls back** to the same composer over live `world` state—it does not rebuild CTIR or become a second authority.

- **`tests/test_prompt_context.py`** — prompt bundle includes full `referent_tracking`; `turn_packet["referent_tracking_compact"]` stays the **four-field** mirror only (no drift toward duplicating the full artifact).
| Prompt-context | `py -m pytest tests/test_prompt_context.py -q` |
